note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

Acute Senses.baseDescription: Increases your Intellect and Agility by 10%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 40 Passive
Mycosis is now enhanced based on your currently active Venom.

Debilitating Venom: Reduces the cast time by -20%.

Blight Venom: Extends the duration of Spore on the target by 4 sec.

Adrenal Venom: Strikes 1 additional nearby target.

Agitation.baseDescription: Dodging an attack now generates 3 Rage.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Serpent's Fang now refreshes a charge of Alkahest.
Your Serpent's Fang now heals up to 5 additional nearby allies and Alkahest now heals an additional nearby target.
Direct healing done by Alkahest now spreads an active Shadra's Balm from the primary target to a nearby ally.
Increases the healing of Shadra's Prayer, Green Salve, and Alkahest by 20%.

Level 40 Passive
Casting Green Salve or Serpent's Fang now has a 30% chance to refresh a charge of Alkahest.
Effective periodic healing with Shadra's Balm now has a 10% chance to make your next Alkahest within 8 seconds is free and instant.
Your Serpent's Fang now increases the healing of your next 2 Alkahests by 25%.

Allies within 100 yds receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, your Antivenom now dispels 1 additional effect.
Your Barbed Stinger and Chitin Rush now applies Wicked Poison.Wicked PoisonDeals 60 + 5.67% shadow SP + 3.2% AP Shadow Damage every 2 sec for 6 seconds.
Dealing damage with Barbed Stinger now increases the target's Nature damage taken by 5% for 12 seconds.

Increases your total armor by 20%.

In addition, while Spider or Beetle form is active your attacks are unable to be parried or dodged.
Reduce all damage taken while in Beetle Form by -6% and increases your movement speed while in Spider Form by 10%.

Level 20 Passive
Increases all primary attributes by 15% while in Beetle Form.

In addition, increases your hit rating by 3% of all primary attributes.
Increases the critical strike chance of all Beetle Form abilities by 10%.

Level 30 Passive
Clearing Exposed Flesh stacks inside Beetle Form now restores health based on stacks cleared.

Augments Beetle Form into a Spider Lord, reducing damage taken by -5%, and while Locust Swarm is active your summons now gain 30% increased haste and damage.

Casting Hivebreak now has a 40% chance, and melee auto attacks now have a 5% chance, to summon 1 Scarab to aid you in combat for 12 seconds.
Carapace Crash now creates a pool of Beetle Slime under each enemy struck.Beetle SlimeDeals 49 Nature Damage to up to 10 enemies within 5 yds every 2 sec for 8 seconds.

Direct damage taken now has a 20% chance to create a pool of Beetle Slime under the enemy.Beetle SlimeDeals 49 Nature Damage to up to 10 enemies within 5 yds every 2 sec for 8 seconds.

Can only occur once every 3 sec.

Blight Antidote.baseDescription: Inject an ally with a powerful magic antidote, dispelling 2 curse effects from them.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Blight Venom by 40%.

Level 40 Passive
While Blight Venom is active, your auto attacks now have a 10% chance to apply it.

In addition, your offensive critical strikes now increase the target's spell damage taken by 10% for 15 seconds.

Level 40 Passive
Mycosis is now enhanced based on your currently active Venom.

Debilitating Venom: Reduces the cast time by -20%.

Blight Venom: Extends the duration of Spore on the target by 4 sec.

Adrenal Venom: Strikes 1 additional nearby target.

Blightcap Injestion.baseDescription: Increases your chance to resist poison and disease effects by 30%.

Boding Dread.baseDescription: Increases your Shadow damage dealt and your critical strike chance with Shadow spells by 6%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 10 Passive
Your Venom Fang now applies a Brood Mark for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times. Some abilities will consume them for an additional effect.
Periodic damage dealt now has a 10% chance to generate a Brood Mark.
Critical strikes with Widow's Kiss now apply 1 additional Brood Mark.
Casting spells that consume Brood Marks now has a -25% chance to refund their Brood Mark cost.

Augments Spider Form into a Brood Lord, causing your Brood Mark spenders to launch webs at the target, sticking to them for 10 seconds.

Each webbed target has their movement speed slowed by -25%.

Critically striking an enemy who is webbed summons 1 to 2 Spiderlings to aid you in combat for 8 seconds.
Increases the effectiveness of Brood Marks by 10% and your hit chance by 5%.
Casting spells that consume Brood Marks now refunds 30 Energy when used with at least 5 Brood Marks on your target.
Increases the amount of times Brood Marks can stack by 2.
Casting spells that consume Brood Marks now has a -25% chance to refund their Brood Mark cost.

Burrow.baseDescription:
Burrow beneath the ground for 8 seconds, becoming immune to all physical attacks and spells, but unable to move or act for the duration.

While burrowed, you can choose a new location within 30 yds to unburrow.

modifyingTalents.description:
Casting Burrow will now apply Tunnel Below to you.

While Skulk is active every 1 sec you reduce the cooldown of Burrow by -1 sec.
Reduces the Rage cost of Hivebreak and Carapace Crash by -6 and increases your chance to hit by 4%.
Carapace Crash now creates a pool of Beetle Slime under each enemy struck.Beetle SlimeDeals 49 Nature Damage to up to 10 enemies within 5 yds every 2 sec for 8 seconds.
Critical strikes with Chitin Rush, Carapace Crash, and Hivebreak now apply Wicked Poison.Wicked PoisonDeals 60 + 5.67% shadow SP + 3.2% AP Shadow Damage every 2 sec for 6 seconds.

Carapace Regeneration.baseDescription:
3 Charges, 20 sec recharge
Regenerate your carapace, reducing your Physical damage taken by -4% and restoring 1% maximum health every 1 sec, draining 10 Rage every tick to remain active, stacking 3 times.

modifyingTalents.description: Reduces the amount of Rage drained by Carapace Regeneration by -3.

Catalyst.baseDescription:
Generates 15 Rage plus 5 every 1 sec and reduces the cost of all of your spells and abilities by -25% for 10 seconds.

Prevents out of combat Rage decay for its duration.

Charmed Plating.baseDescription:
Reduces damage taken by all party and raid members by -3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, reduces your chance to be hit by spells by -2%.

modifyingTalents.description: Removes the Rage cost of Chitin Rush and increases its range by 5 yds.
Reduces the cooldown of Chitin Rush by -3 sec and increases its damage by 15%.
Critical strikes with Chitin Rush, Carapace Crash, and Hivebreak now apply Wicked Poison.Wicked PoisonDeals 60 + 5.67% shadow SP + 3.2% AP Shadow Damage every 2 sec for 6 seconds.
Damage dealt by Chitin Rush now increases your dodge chance by 1% for 5 seconds, stacking 8 times.
Increases the critical strike chance of Chitin Rush by 20% and its critical damage by 10%.
Your Barbed Stinger and Chitin Rush now applies Wicked Poison.Wicked PoisonDeals 60 + 5.67% shadow SP + 3.2% AP Shadow Damage every 2 sec for 6 seconds.

Chitinous Spikes.baseDescription: Taking direct damage has a 20% chance to retaliate for 5% of the damage taken.

modifyingTalents.description:
Damage and healing done now has a 10% chance to apply Curse of Shadra for 10 seconds.

Dealing damage or healing with Serpent's Fang, Claw Strike, or Venom Fang on an enemy that is cursed will deal damage or heal them for an additional 25% of the value and heal you for 90.

Requires Spider Form
Consumes Brood Marks
Spray poison upon an enemy and nearby enemies, dealing Nature damage over 15 seconds.
 1 Mark: 88 + 93.75% nature SP Nature damage.
 2 Marks: 112 + 120% nature SP Nature damage.
 3 Marks: 144 + 153.75% nature SP Nature damage.
 4 Marks: 182 + 195% nature SP Nature damage.
 5 Marks: 245 + 262.5% nature SP Nature damage.

Contagion.baseDescription: For 15 seconds, all periodic damage dealt now has a 30% chance to burst dealing 92 + 20% shadow SP Shadow damage to 8 enemies within 8 yds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Damage and healing done now has a 10% chance to apply Curse of Shadra for 10 seconds.

Dealing damage or healing with Serpent's Fang, Claw Strike, or Venom Fang on an enemy that is cursed will deal damage or heal them for an additional 25% of the value and heal you for 90.

Summon a Fungarian to attack an enemy, dealing 226 + 65% SP Nature damage, and instantly apply Debilitating Venom to your target. Lasts 20 seconds.Debilitating Venom (Slow)Movement speed slowed by -40% for 8 seconds.

Can be used in any form.

Level 40 Passive
Mycosis is now enhanced based on your currently active Venom.

Debilitating Venom: Reduces the cast time by -20%.

Blight Venom: Extends the duration of Spore on the target by 4 sec.

Adrenal Venom: Strikes 1 additional nearby target.
Reduces the cast time and increases the mana cost of Decay by 50%.
Damage dealt by Spore now reduces the cooldown of Decay by -1 sec.
Each time you spawn a Mushroom, you now reduce the cooldown of Decay by -1 sec.
Increases the critical strike chance of Widow's Kiss on Diseased targets by 30%.

Enchanted Chitin.baseDescription: Increases your Armor contribution from mail by 50%.

Enduring Exoskeleton.baseDescription:
Direct damage taken now has a 30% chance to generate 2 Rage and 3% base mana.

Can only occur once per sec.

Envenomed Weapons.baseDescription: Envenoms the weapons of all nearby allies for 30 minutes, giving them a 5% chance to launch a jet of poison at their target whenever they deal damage, dealing 8 + 10% nature SP + 10% AP Nature damage.

Exposed Flesh.baseDescription:
Level 10 Passive
Hostile attacks against you now have a 50% chance to grant a stack of Exposed Flesh.
Exposed FleshGenerates 10 Rage and increases your Physical Damage taken 3% for 20 seconds, stacking 10 times.

modifyingTalents.description: Clears Exposed Flesh stacks to poison nearby enemies for 5 seconds, and an additional 1 sec per cleared stack, dealing 15 + 10% nature SP + 5% AP Nature damage every 1 sec.
Clears Exposed Flesh stacks to reduce your damage taken by -20% for 5 seconds and an additional 1 sec per stack.

Level 30 Passive
Clearing Exposed Flesh stacks inside Beetle Form now restores health based on stacks cleared.

Clears Exposed Flesh stacks and flings a Barbed Stinger into an enemy for 10 seconds, plus an additional 1 sec per cleared stack.

Recasting this ability on the same target will rip the stinger out, pulling them to you and dealing Nature damage, scaling based on how long the stinger was left in them.
When a stack of Exposed Flesh is applied you are now healed for 1% of your maximum health.
Casting Harden now clears Exposed Flesh.
Allows Exposed Flesh to stack 5 additional times and increase your Physical damage taken by -1% less.
Shatters your exoskeleton, instantly applying 15 stacks of Exposed Flesh and increasing your movement speed by 30% for 8 seconds.
Increases the damage dealt by Expulsion by 20%.

Level 40 Passive
Increases your spell damage by 30% of your attack power and allows periodic damage dealt by Expulsion to critically strike.

Level 50 Passive
Critical strikes dealt with direct damage now apply Protogenesis to you, stacking 10 times.ProtogenesisHeals for 65 every 3 sec for 10 seconds.

At 10 stacks, all stacks are consumed and the cooldown of Expulsion is reduced by -3 sec.

Extraction.baseDescription: For 15 seconds, your Intellect and Spirit are doubled and all critical periodic healing done by you restores 5% of your missing mana.

modifyingTalents.description: Facemelter now ticks -20% faster and the duration is increased by 6 sec.
After using Facemelter, your next Widowmaker within 15 seconds now deals 20% increased damage and strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.

Fang Blessing.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance by 6%.

modifyingTalents.description: Periodic damage dealt now has a 10% chance to reduce the cooldown of Serpent's Fang and Fungal Assailant by 20% of the remaining cooldown.
Fungal Assailant now spawns 3 Mushrooms below the target.Mushroom (dmg)Drop a Mushroom near the target that explodes after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 35% SP Plague Damage to all nearby enemies.
Fungal Assailant now summons 2 additional Fungarians.

Fungal Growth.baseDescription: Shadow and Nature damage dealt now has a 35% chance to increase periodic damage you deal to the target by 2% for 30 seconds, stacking 10 times.

modifyingTalents.description:
Fungus grows throughout the body of an enemy, dealing 153 + 65% nature SP Nature damage and applying a shield that absorbs the next 100 + 200% SP healing done to them for 8 seconds.

Deals 20% increased damage for each stack of Fungal Growth on the target.
Increases Mycosis's damage through Fungal Growth stacks by 5%.

Fungal Link.baseDescription:
Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, the range of your Rot spells is increased by 20% and the threat they generate is reduced by -20%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Summon a Fungarian to attack an enemy, dealing 226 + 65% SP Nature damage, and instantly apply Debilitating Venom to your target. Lasts 20 seconds.Debilitating Venom (Slow)Movement speed slowed by -40% for 8 seconds.

Can be used in any form.
Your Mycosis now enrages your Fungarians for 6 seconds, increasing its damage and attack speed by 30% for 6 seconds.
Fungal Assailant now summons 2 additional Fungarians.

Fury of Anub'Rekhan.baseDescription: Increases your maximum mana, Energy, and Rage by 10%.

Fury of Shadra.baseDescription: Increases your damage and healing against targets below 35% health by 15%.

Green Salve.baseDescription:
Rapidly heal an ally for 30 over 6 seconds.

At the end of the duration, this will seek another nearby ally with the lowest health and heal them for 13 + 24.46% healing.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Green Salve now also refunds you 20% of your base mana.
Reduces the cooldown of Green Salve by -2 sec and increases the healing done at the end of the duration by 50%.

Doubles the duration, cooldown, and healing of Green Salve.

In addition, it now seeks another nearby ally to heal every 6 sec, instead of at the end of the duration.
Increases the healing of Shadra's Prayer, Green Salve, and Alkahest by 20%.

Level 40 Passive
Casting Green Salve or Serpent's Fang now has a 30% chance to refresh a charge of Alkahest.
Casting Green Salve now resets the cooldown of Serpent's Fang and removes the cost of your next Serpent's Fang for 8 seconds.

Hallucinogenic Venom.baseDescription: Allows 50% of your mana to regenerate while in combat.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Harden now clears Exposed Flesh.
Critical strikes with Venom Bolt, Hivebreak, or Venom Fang now increase your movement speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
Reduces the Rage cost of Hivebreak and Carapace Crash by -6 and increases your chance to hit by 4%.
Dealing periodic damage now has a 10% chance to make your next Hivebreak within 8 seconds free of cost and deal 50% increased damage.
Critical strikes with Chitin Rush, Carapace Crash, and Hivebreak now apply Wicked Poison.Wicked PoisonDeals 60 + 5.67% shadow SP + 3.2% AP Shadow Damage every 2 sec for 6 seconds.
Hivebreak now consumes -2 sec of Venomtip Poison's duration to gush toxic slime, dealing 20 Nature damage to 5 enemies within 5 yds.

Augments Beetle Form into a Spider Lord, reducing damage taken by -5%, and while Locust Swarm is active your summons now gain 30% increased haste and damage.

Casting Hivebreak now has a 40% chance, and melee auto attacks now have a 5% chance, to summon 1 Scarab to aid you in combat for 12 seconds.

Impale.baseDescription: Fire spikes through the floor impaling all enemies in a 15 yd line for 83 + 51.07% shadow SP Shadow damage and stunning them for 3.5 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Designate the area around you as your Lair for 8 seconds. 

Enemies are unable to target into or out of the Lair and their movement speed is slowed by -60%.
You now apply Fungic to enemies affected by Lethargy, dealing an additional 20% of the damage dealt by your Venom Bolt or Serpent's Fang as Nature damage over 3 seconds, stacking up to 2 times.

Locust Swarm.baseDescription: Leeches 67 + 10% SP + 3% AP health from nearby enemies every 2 sec for 10 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
Augments Beetle Form into a Spider Lord, reducing damage taken by -5%, and while Locust Swarm is active your summons now gain 30% increased haste and damage.

Casting Hivebreak now has a 40% chance, and melee auto attacks now have a 5% chance, to summon 1 Scarab to aid you in combat for 12 seconds.

Mending Mist.baseDescription:
Spread a precarious mist to up to 8 allies within 30 yds, healing them for 9 + 15% healing every 1 sec for 7 seconds.

After 1.69 sec, all allies within 30 yds are healed for an additional 104 + 23.1% healing.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the bonus healing scaling of Serpent's Fang, Mending Mist, and Shadra's Balm by 30%.
Extend the duration of Shadra's Balm and Mending Mist by 15 sec on all allies within 30 yds.
Increases the duration of Shadra's Balm and Mending Mist and Shadra's Prayer by 3 sec.

Inject an enemy with parasitic spores, dealing 20 + 17.5% nature SP Shadow damage, plus an additional 231 over 21 seconds.

After 10 sec, drop a Mushroom below the target that explodes after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 25% nature SP Nature damage to nearby enemies.
Casting Serpent's Fang now spawns a Mushroom below the target that will explode after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 12.5% SP Nature damage to nearby enemies.
Apply Wilt to up to 5 enemies at target location and drop a Mushroom that will explode after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 25% nature SP Nature damage all enemies within 5 yds.
Fungal Assailant now spawns 3 Mushrooms below the target.Mushroom (dmg)Drop a Mushroom near the target that explodes after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 35% SP Plague Damage to all nearby enemies.
Each time you spawn a Mushroom, you now reduce the cooldown of Decay by -1 sec.

For 20 seconds, when you kill an enemy that yields experience or honor they now spawn a Mushroom beneath them. Can only occur once per sec.Mushroom (dmg)Drop a Mushroom near the target that explodes after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 35% SP Plague Damage to all nearby enemies.
Fungal Assailant now spawns 3 Mushrooms below the target.Mushroom (dmg)Drop a Mushroom near the target that explodes after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 35% SP Plague Damage to all nearby enemies.

Create an 8 yd ring beneath you for 10 seconds that deals 59 Nature damage every 1 sec to enemies inside and immediately grows 12 Mushrooms in a circle around you.

At the end of the duration, up to 15 allies inside are healed for 845 + 65% nature SP.

Can be used in any form.

Mycelial Healing.baseDescription: All effective healing done now increases your periodic healing done to an ally by 1% for 30 seconds, stacking 10 times.

modifyingTalents.description:
Increases your critical strike chance and critical healing done by 20% for 20 seconds and instantly restore 30% of your maximum mana, but consumes all stacks of Mycelial Healing on all nearby allies.

While active, all periodic critical strikes heal for an additional 20% of the healing done.
Increases Mycosis's damage through Fungal Growth stacks by 5%.
Your Mycosis now enrages your Fungarians for 6 seconds, increasing its damage and attack speed by 30% for 6 seconds.

Blight Venom: Extends the duration of Spore on the target by 4 sec.

Adrenal Venom: Strikes 1 additional nearby target.
Draw power from the Serpent Lord's Ring instantly regenerating 20% of your maximum mana and causing your Mycosiss to trigger no cooldown and be free of cost for 15 seconds.

Nerubian Sting.baseDescription:
Applies 1 Brood Mark
Sting an enemy, dealing 26 + 25% shadow SP Shadow damage and an additional 20 + 50% shadow SP over 15 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Venom Fang and Nerubian Sting by 10%.
Each stack of Nerubian Sting now increases the damage dealt to the target by your Widowmaker and Venom Fang by 8%.

Critical strikes with Venom Fang and Nerubian Sting now deals an additional 25% of their direct damage instantly as Nature damage.

Damage dealt in this way has a 40% chance to extend the duration of Rotfang by 1 sec.
Augments your Spider Form, increasing your damage dealt by 10% and causing it to allow your Nerubian Sting to stack 1 additional time.

Damage dealt to enemies below 35% health now reduces the cooldown of Noxious Empowerment by -2 sec.

In addition, your Widowmaker now deals 20% increased damage to enemies below 35% health.
Reduces the cooldown of Noxious Empowerment by -60 sec.

Pendo's Charm.baseDescription: Increases the rage generated by your damage dealt by 15%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Pheromones by 20% and their duration by 50%.

Playing With Poison.baseDescription: Increases your Nature damage and healing done by 5%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases critical damage dealt by Widow's Kiss, Widowmaker and Venom Fang by 50% against Poisoned targets.
Increases your healing done by 15% on allies below 35% health or if they are Poisoned.

Protraction.baseDescription: Increases the duration of your Venomancer periodic damage effects by 6 sec.

Prowler.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell damage by 25% of your Intellect and your hit rating by 3% of your Intellect.

Regenerative Properties.baseDescription:
Reduces all damage taken by -5%, but damage taken now has a 10% chance to shatter your exoskeleton, removing this damage reduction effect.

When your exoskeleton shatters you regenerate 12% of your maximum health over 12 seconds, after this duration your exoskeleton regenerates.

Reinforced Exoskeleton.baseDescription: Increases your maximum health and your dodge chance by 6%.

modifyingTalents.description: Embrace Shadra's lifeblood, reducing your damage taken and pushback from casting spells by -20% and causing all damage taken to cast Rejuvenating Venom. Lasts for 10 seconds.Rejuvenating Venom (Heal)Heal a random ally within 30 yds of your target for 67 + 9.2% healing over 6 seconds.

Rejuvenating Venom will now affect 1 additional nearby ally.
Increases the proc chance of Rejuvenating Venom by 10%.

Rotpriest.baseDescription: Increases your spell critical damage by 100%.

Whenever you take Magic damage, reduce damage taken by that magic school by -10% for 10 seconds.

Can only occur once every 30 sec per school of magic.

Casting Hivebreak now has a 40% chance, and melee auto attacks now have a 5% chance, to summon 1 Scarab to aid you in combat for 12 seconds.

Sepsis Bloom.baseDescription:
Create pustules that swell and then burst, disorienting a target enemy for 6 seconds.

All of your Venomancer poison effects are purged from the target, dealing damage equal to their remaining duration at the end of the duration.

Shadra's Aid.baseDescription: Envelop an ally in Shadra's grace, reducing all damage taken by -20% and causing direct damage taken to restore 3% maximum health for 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Shadra's Aid on an ally now also casts it on yourself.

Increases your spell damage by 25% of your Intellect and your haste rating by 20% of your Intellect.

Every 9 sec, your Shadra's Prayer will now restore 1% of the target's maximum mana, 8 Energy or Focus, 4 Rage and 4 Runic Power.

Critically striking an enemy who is webbed summons 1 to 2 Spiderlings to aid you in combat for 8 seconds.
Augments your Spider Form, increasing your damage dealt by 10% and causing it to allow your Nerubian Sting to stack 1 additional time.

Augments Spider Form into a Brood Lord, causing your Brood Mark spenders to launch webs at the target, sticking to them for 10 seconds.

Each webbed target has their movement speed slowed by -25%.

Critically striking an enemy who is webbed summons 1 to 2 Spiderlings to aid you in combat for 8 seconds.

Spindlebind.baseDescription: Emit webs at all enemies behind you, rooting them for 4 seconds, and unleashing a beetle on the trapped enemy from below, inflicting 61 + 40% nature SP Nature damage.

modifyingTalents.description:
Your Spindlebind now has 2 charges, a 25 sec cooldown, and deals increased damage.Spindlebind (Tunneler)2 Charges, 25 sec recharge
Command a tunnel beetle to attack your target from below, inflicting 159 + 65% nature SP Nature damage and rooting them for 4 seconds.

Spiritual Healing.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell critical strike rating and your healing power by 20% of your Intellect.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 40 Passive
Mycosis is now enhanced based on your currently active Venom.

Debilitating Venom: Reduces the cast time by -20%.

Blight Venom: Extends the duration of Spore on the target by 4 sec.

Adrenal Venom: Strikes 1 additional nearby target.
Damage dealt by Spore now reduces the cooldown of Decay by -1 sec.

Tome of Ahn'kahet.baseDescription: Damage and effective healing done now has an 8% chance to grant Tome of Ahn'kahet for 15 seconds.Tome of Ahn'kahetThe next spell has its costs reduced by -100%.

Toxic Stride.baseDescription: Embrace Shadra's blessing, granting you immunity to all silence and interrupt effects and allowing you to cast your spells while moving for 15 seconds.

Tranquil Essence.baseDescription: Reduces the threat generated by your healing spells by -20% and increases your periodic healing by 10%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Casting Burrow will now apply Tunnel Below to you.

While Skulk is active every 1 sec you reduce the cooldown of Burrow by -1 sec.
Triggering a Venom now has a 25% chance to generate you 5 Energy.

Level 40 Passive
Mycosis is now enhanced based on your currently active Venom.

Debilitating Venom: Reduces the cast time by -20%.

Blight Venom: Extends the duration of Spore on the target by 4 sec.

Adrenal Venom: Strikes 1 additional nearby target.
Critical strikes with Venom Bolt, Hivebreak, or Venom Fang now increase your movement speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
Increases the damage of Venom Bolt by 30% and its critical strike chance by 6%.
Reduces the cast time of Venom Bolt by -0.3 sec.
You now apply Fungic to enemies affected by Lethargy, dealing an additional 20% of the damage dealt by your Venom Bolt or Serpent's Fang as Nature damage over 3 seconds, stacking up to 2 times.

Level 50 Passive
When you cast any spell you now have a 20% chance to gain Cycle of Decay.Cycle of Decay (Proc)Your Venom Bolt is now castable while moving and casts -30% faster for 6 seconds.
Critical strikes with Venom Bolt, Hivebreak, or Venom Fang now increase your movement speed by 20% for 3 seconds.

Damage and healing done now has a 10% chance to apply Curse of Shadra for 10 seconds.

Dealing damage or healing with Serpent's Fang, Claw Strike, or Venom Fang on an enemy that is cursed will deal damage or heal them for an additional 25% of the value and heal you for 90.

Level 10 Passive
Your Venom Fang now applies a Brood Mark for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times. Some abilities will consume them for an additional effect.

Every 3rd Venom Fang becomes Widow's Kiss, dealing increased damage and granting you increased haste.Widow's Kiss (Transform)Applies 1 Brood Mark
Bite an enemy for 41 + 50% shadow SP + 10% AP Shadow damage, increasing your haste by 20% for 4 seconds. Scales with modifiers to Venom Fang.
Increases the critical strike chance of Venom Fang and Nerubian Sting by 10%.
Increases the damage dealt by Venom Fang by 15% and causes it to increase the target's chance to be critically struck by spells by 3% for 15 seconds.

Periodic damage dealt now has a 5% chance to remove the Energy cost from your next Venom Fang or Widow's Kiss within 8 seconds and increase its damage by 20%.

Can occur only once every 2 sec.
Increases critical damage dealt by Widow's Kiss, Widowmaker and Venom Fang by 50% against Poisoned targets.
Each stack of Nerubian Sting now increases the damage dealt to the target by your Widowmaker and Venom Fang by 8%.

Critical strikes with Venom Fang and Nerubian Sting now deals an additional 25% of their direct damage instantly as Nature damage.

Damage dealt in this way has a 40% chance to extend the duration of Rotfang by 1 sec.

Level 50 Passive
Your Venom Fang now costs -20% less Energy when while Widow's Kiss is active.

Venom Saturation.baseDescription: Increases the damage of your poison effects by 25% against enemies above 50% health.

Venomancy Expert.baseDescription: Reduces the cost of all spells and abilities by -5%.

modifyingTalents.description:
Activate Weakening Venom for 120 minutes, giving your casts a 35% chance to deal 59 + 12.5% SP Shadow damage and reduce an enemy's attack power by 234 for 8 seconds.

You can have a maximum of 2 unique Venoms active at a time.

Activate Adrenal Venom for 120 minutes, giving your casts a 25% chance to increase your haste by 6% for 6 seconds, stacking 3 times.

You can have a maximum of 2 unique Venoms active at a time.
Increases the duration of your Venoms by 50%.
Increases the proc chance of all Venoms by 10%.
Increases the effectiveness of your Venoms by 30%.
Enrage for 12 seconds, increasing your chance to trigger Venoms by 50%, your Energy regeneration by 100%, and increasing your damage dealt by 20% for 12 seconds.

Venomtip Poison.baseDescription: Spray poison on an enemy and all enemies near them, dealing 30 + 11% nature SP + 10% AP Nature damage and reducing their attack speed by -20% for 0 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the damage of Venomtip Poison by 30%.
Reduces the Rage cost of Venomtip Poison by -10.
Hivebreak now consumes -2 sec of Venomtip Poison's duration to gush toxic slime, dealing 20 Nature damage to 5 enemies within 5 yds.

Virulent Opening.baseDescription: Increases the critical strike chance of your poisons by 20% on enemies above 75% health.

modifyingTalents.description: Disarm an enemy's melee weapons with your claws for 5 seconds and apply Weakening Venom to them for 10 sec.Weakening Venom (Proc)Deals 59 + 12.5% SP Shadow Damage and reduces attack power by 23.
Allows Wicked Poison to stack an additional time.
Your Barbed Stinger and Chitin Rush now applies Wicked Poison.Wicked PoisonDeals 60 + 5.67% shadow SP + 3.2% AP Shadow Damage every 2 sec for 6 seconds.
Critical strikes with Widow's Kiss now apply 1 additional Brood Mark.

Periodic damage dealt now has a 5% chance to remove the Energy cost from your next Venom Fang or Widow's Kiss within 8 seconds and increase its damage by 20%.

Can occur only once every 2 sec.
Increases critical damage dealt by Widow's Kiss, Widowmaker and Venom Fang by 50% against Poisoned targets.
Increases the critical strike chance of Widow's Kiss on Diseased targets by 30%.

Level 50 Passive
Your Venom Fang now costs -20% less Energy when while Widow's Kiss is active.

Damage dealt to enemies below 35% health now reduces the cooldown of Noxious Empowerment by -2 sec.

In addition, your Widowmaker now deals 20% increased damage to enemies below 35% health.
Increases critical damage dealt by Widow's Kiss, Widowmaker and Venom Fang by 50% against Poisoned targets.
After using Facemelter, your next Widowmaker within 15 seconds now deals 20% increased damage and strikes 2 additional nearby enemies.
Each stack of Nerubian Sting now increases the damage dealt to the target by your Widowmaker and Venom Fang by 8%.

Wilt.baseDescription: Wilt the life of an enemy with vile poison, dealing 144 Nature damage over 18 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Wilt now has a 15% chance when it deals damage to strike again as Shadow damage.
Your Wilt now strikes an additional nearby enemy.

Damage dealt by your Wilt now applies Lethargy to affected enemies.Lethargy (Dummy)Reduces an enemy's chance to hit and increases their Nature Damage taken by you by -5% for 6 seconds.

Dispelling this effect increases the dispeller's resource costs by 100% for 5 seconds.
Apply Wilt to up to 5 enemies at target location and drop a Mushroom that will explode after 2 sec, dealing 217 + 25% nature SP Nature damage all enemies within 5 yds.
Increases the damage of Wilt by 20% and it now increases the chance to hit the target with spells by 3% for 20 seconds.
Harmful critical strikes now increase the duration of Wilt by 2 sec.

Withering Venom.baseDescription: Inject an enemy with a devastating venom, dealing 16 + 20% nature SP Nature damage every 3 sec for 21 seconds. Damage is dealt slowly at first, and builds up over time.

modifyingTalents.description: Withering Venom now deals an additional 1 + 125% shadow SP Shadow damage at the end of its duration.
Increases the spell power scaling of Withering Venom by 15%.

Worship.baseDescription: Allows all critical heals to increase periodic healing the target receives from you by 10% for 5 seconds.
